productDisplayName: Puma Men Funpack Red Casual Shoe With Extra Lace
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. They are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. This shoe comes with an extra pair of laces in a contrast colour. Upper Canvas upper with fabric overlays and a durable PU toe box Formstripe for absolute comfort and durability PU foxing for abrasion-free comfort Lacing system for a customised Fit Midsole EVA midsole for comfort and impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with ergonomic grooves for absolute grip and traction  Shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
